patch.value: TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 is hardcoded and stamped on every event with no documented upgrade protocol; becomes a reliability risk if the event structure must change.

ADR documents the negotiation protocol; queue entries carry client_schema_version distinct from event schema_version; endpoint probe parses an advertised server max-version header; tests assert schema_version on all 3 event types; no v1 behavior change.
TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 is hardcoded and stamped on every event with no documented upgrade protocol; becomes a reliability risk if the event structure must change.

value.author: codex-telemetry-batch
value.text: Implemented telemetry schema negotiation prep with backward compatibility: queue envelope now writes client_schema_version=1 while each event payload keeps schema_version=1; health endpoint probe now parses advertised server max schema version headers (x-pm-telemetry-max-schema-version and x-pm-telemetry-max-version) and exposes endpoint_probe.max_schema_version in telemetry details; runtime classification marks telemetry command as diagnostics and telemetry clear instrumentation is skipped so clear does not recreate queue files. Verification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts, node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (100% lines/branches/functions/statements), and full gates pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm quality:static && pnpm security:scan && pnpm audit --audit-level low all passed.

patch.value: Completed telemetry schema negotiation prep: queue client_schema_version metadata, health endpoint max-schema header parsing, architecture ADR update, and passing full test/security gates.
